findings.summary: Skadis clock (112 components, 5 sheets). Correct: crystal, BC807 PNP transistors, USB-C CC pulldowns, SPI bus, decoupling. Incorrect: duplicate SPI bus detection (MCU and ISP connector report same bus twice), crystal frequency null despite Crystal value.

correct.description: Crystal Y1 with 22pF load caps correctly detected
Q1-Q4 BC807 PNP LED drivers correctly identified

incorrect.description: Duplicate SPI bus: bus_id 0 and pin_J1 contain identical signals

suggestions: Deduplicate SPI bus when connector and MCU share same nets
